boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: Lägger till <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> i slutet av varje drag (en poäng per ruta)
boonClickbaitDescription: Ger <multi>+2 Multi</multi> per butiksreroll i denna run (nu <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
